description: Create a C4 software architecture model for an Internet Banking System based on the specification provided in '~/Desktop/c4_architecture_spec.txt'. Produce a single draw.io file at '~/Diagrams/banking_system_c4.drawio' containing two pages: a Level 1 'System Context' diagram and a Level 2 'Container' diagram. Use specific C4 notation shapes (Person, Software System, Container, etc.) and label all relationships with the descriptions found in the specification. Export the complete multi-page diagram as a PDF to '~/Diagrams/banking_system_c4.pdf'.
